stemHtml: Per ICAO Annex 14, where should aircraft stand markings be provided?

options.a: For designated parking positions on a paved apron and on de-icing/anti-icing facilities.
options.b: For designated parking positions on any apron only.
options.c: For designated parking positions on any apron and on de-icing/anti-icing facilities.
options.d: For designated parking positions on a paved apron only.
